arts.sum: Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone. Referee Ben Speedie explained that player safety was a motivating factor as to why he postponed Derby County's third-round clash against Leyton Orient.

arts.ttl: Derby County v Leyton Orient injury latest as Ebou Adams injury explained
arts.sum: But he does have some injury problems to contend with given the Rams were without Ebou Adams, Joe Ward and Corey Blackett-Taylor for the defeat at Bristol City. But Paul Warne revealed last week that Ozoh is due to be back in training after the game against Leyton Orient which would be a considerable boost given how well he has done since joining from Palace in the summer.

arts.ttl: Paul Warne sends Kane Wilson message amid Derby County contract question
arts.sum: Derby County head coach Paul Warne says he is yet to hold talks with Kane Wilson over a new contract. Would you hand Kane Wilson a new contract?

arts.ttl: Tottenham loan star Josh Keeley on making history with Leyton Orient ahead of FA Cup clash
arts.sum: Tottenham goalkeeper Josh Keeley has already made a big impression at Leyton Orient and is out to create more FA Cup memories after scoring in the last round against Oldham

arts.ttl: Paul Warne opens up on Derby County transfer and won't 'shut door' on move
arts.sum: Paul Warne says he will not shut the door on replacing Sonny Bradley after explaining the circumstances of the Derby County defender's exit. But Warne wished the defender well and, at the same time, said he would only consider a replacement if it made Derby stronger.

arts.ttl: Rooney starts: Derby County team news and predicted XI to face Leyton Orient
arts.sum: Derby County switch their focus from the Championship to the FA Cup this weekend as they face Leyton… The post Rooney starts: Derby County team news and predicted XI to face Leyton Orient appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Derby County hit by illness as Rams set to dip into the academy for Leyton Orient clash
arts.sum: Derby County will include five players from their academy for tomorrow's FA Cup clash against Leyton Orient after illness impacted the first-team squad. Several players and staff have been struggling and that has led Warne to turn to some of Derby's fledgling stars after consulting academy manager Matt Hale.

arts.ttl: Paul Warne responds as Louie Barry to Derby County transfer links continue
arts.sum: Paul Warne understands why he is being linked with a move for Aston Villa's Louie Barry but Derby County's head coach says he will not talk about another club's player. I reckon if I typed in Louie Barry's name, I reckon there are more than Derby County being linked to him.

arts.ttl: Leyton Orient boss pays Derby County the ultimate compliment but nails their reality
arts.sum: Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone. Derby did the double over Orient on their way to promotion last season but now face a side who have hit excellent form in League One coming into the game.
